scripts.deploy: vite build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://insuremail-ai-dashboard --delete --cache-control 'max-age=3600' && echo 'Dashboard deployed to S3' && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name insuremail-ai-dashboard --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`CloudFrontDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) --paths '/*' 2>/dev/null || echo 'CloudFront invalidation skipped (optional)'
